title: hieracium murorum subsp. kupfferi
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. kupfferi, also known as Kupffer's hawkweed, is a subspecies of perennial herb in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. kupfferi include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. kupfferi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
